title: ficus ribes var. cuneata
intro: Ficus ribes var. cuneata, also known as the Indian banyan, is a variety of fig tree native to the Himalayan region and India. The medicinal properties of Ficus ribes var. cuneata include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are often used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Ficus ribes var. cuneata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
